caption:
Most leads don't disappear because your ad failed.

They disappear because nobody responded fast enough.

Here's an example of what fires automatically in the first 5 minutes after someone submits a lead form.

Example workflow. Illustrative, not a specific client account.

Want this exact sequence built for your shop?

DM "SYSTEM".

#SpeedToLead #LeadFollowUp #ServiceBusiness #CRMAutomation #HomeServices
rationale: Fills the under-served Demonstrations/System Walkthroughs category with the ad-to-first-response handoff, a stage this account hasn't shown yet (distinct from the missed-call text-back, review, reactivation, and CRM pipeline demos already shipped), using the slideshow format the brief recommends for this category.
